directors.name: Randall C. Stuewe
directors.bio_summary: Randall C. Stuewe serves as Chairman of the Board and Chief Executive Officer of Darling Ingredients Inc. He holds the combined role of Chairman and CEO pursuant to his employment agreement, subject to continued election by stockholders.

directors.name: Gary W. Mize
directors.bio_summary: Gary W. Mize serves as the independent Lead Director of Darling Ingredients Inc., elected annually by the independent members of the Board. He chairs the nominating and corporate governance committee and actively engages with the CEO and other members of management.

directors.name: Charles Adair
directors.bio_summary: Charles Adair is an independent director who chairs the audit committee and also serves on the nominating and corporate governance committee. He has been designated as an audit committee financial expert.

directors.name: Beth Albright
directors.bio_summary: Beth Albright is an independent director serving on the audit committee and the compensation committee.

directors.name: Larry A. Barden
directors.bio_summary: Larry A. Barden is an independent director serving on the nominating and corporate governance committee.

directors.name: Celeste A. Clark
directors.bio_summary: Celeste A. Clark is an independent director serving on the compensation committee.

directors.name: Linda Goodspeed
directors.bio_summary: Linda Goodspeed is an independent director who chairs the compensation committee and also serves on the nominating and corporate governance committee.

directors.name: Enderson Guimaraes
directors.bio_summary: Enderson Guimaraes is an independent director serving on the audit committee and the compensation committee.

directors.name: Randy L. Hill
directors.bio_summary: Randy L. Hill is an independent director serving on the audit committee and has been designated as an audit committee financial expert.

directors.name: Michael E. Rescoe
directors.bio_summary: Michael E. Rescoe is an independent director who served during the fiscal year ended December 28, 2024.

directors.name: Kurt Stoffel
directors.bio_summary: Kurt Stoffel is an independent director serving on the audit committee and has been designated as an audit committee financial expert.

directors.name: Soren Schroder
directors.bio_summary: Soren Schroder was appointed to the Board in February 2025 and serves on the audit committee and the compensation committee. He has been determined to meet the independence requirements of the NYSE and the SEC.
